name: Advocaat (Dutch Eggnog)
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the eggs and beat the yolks with the salt and sugar until the mixture is thick and creamy.
2. Slowly add the cognac to the egg yolk mixture, beating constantly.
3. Pour the mixture into a double saucepan and heat gently, whisking continuously until the advocaat is warm (not hot) and thick.
4. Remove from heat and stir in the vanilla essence.
5. Pour into a jug. Serve in a glass with a teaspoon.
Advocaat is served in a glass and eaten with a teaspoon. It can also be topped with whipped cream. Advocaat is thick and creamy, not foamy like eggnog in America. Enjoy!
